title: Workbuddy Workflow (Batch 1 — issue #204)
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of .github/workbuddy/workflows/*.md. The state machine itself lives in a fenced ```yaml code block in the Markdown body and is parsed by the loader, not this schema (see $comment). Keep this in sync with internal/config/types.go (WorkflowConfig).
$comment: JSON Schema cannot validate content embedded in a Markdown code block; the `states:` map under the body is enforced by the Go validator (codes WB-X001/X005/S004 etc.) rather than by this file. Editor integrations get coverage of the frontmatter only.

issue_label.description: Issue label that activates this workflow. Two workflows must not share the same trigger label.

max_retries.description: Upper bound on state revisits before the runtime records retry/failure intent.
